programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with the Groom Hunt: Groom Lee and his brother take off on a tour of Europe, telling bride Becky that if she wants to marry Lee, she has to find him first.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The first episode of the Emmy-winning comedy, shot from the perspective of an unseen documentary maker. It's not easy being part of a family these days..

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil is determined to help Luke show his mum that he's responsible enough to have the new bike they just got him, but Phil ends up being the irresponsible one.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Long Beach in California to save Nino's, a failing Italian restaurant that opened in 1958 and is now under the misguided leadership of eldest son Nino.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam makes an inspirational video about a football game against William Penn's rival. Beverly and Murray try to buy a neighbour's house.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry's poison ivy causes problems for Erica and Geoff. And having Mr Glascott living next door presents a challenge for the whole family.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay helps Manny with a school fundraiser. Claire campaigns for a stop sign at a busy junction. Phil and Luke try to create a viral video. Gloria searches for Stella.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria tries to help Jay and Manny with their problems, but they're both unreceptive. Cam and Mitch are the victims of a hit-and-run accident.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As Feedback Week continues, one bride decides she's had enough of the experts' advice and ignores them completely.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Boxer Kirsty puts her gloves down to find love. Ambitious Rose meets Hugo, who wears a cravat but has never been on a date. And can Holly kick the habit of falling for bad boys.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owner of the Mill Street Bistro in Ohio claims to have the best menu between New York and LA. But the diners don't agree.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa signs up to participate in the future colonisation of Mars, Marge's attempt to use reverse psychology to discourage her goes badly wrong.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes it his mission to find romance for Smithers. Milhouse is jealous of Lisa's leading man when she's cast in the school production of Casablanca.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: After selling a house to Mitch and Cam's friends, Phil and Claire take them out for a celebratory dinner but get drunk and overshare.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: It's a day of disturbing realisations when Mitchell manages to ruin one of Jay's proudest golf moments. Gloria stumbles upon Claire's dangerous little secret.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As Feedback Week continues, one bride decides she's had enough of the experts' advice and ignores them completely.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining all-stars are off to Greece. And what better way to embrace Greece's rich, storied history and culture than modelling lingerie in a giant bowl of Greek salad.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa finds himself embroiled in a cold case when the police unearth an old coffin with his business card in it - and two bodies.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The women of Springfield take centre stage, with some special Simpsonified movie parodies including Barbie and The Chronicles of Narnia.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa meets Bleeding Gums Murphy's deaf son Monk, and decides she has to help him - whether he wants help or not.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia - Brand new series
programme.desc: Bec attempts to apologise for her text scandal at the sixth dinner party. But apparently that also involves shifting the blame onto someone else.

programme.title: MAFS Australia: After the Dinner Party - Brand new series
programme.desc: Alissa, David and Joel unpack the screenshot saga, with some explosive unseen footage exposing the calculated manipulation behind the leak.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Eurovision, Citadel, The Greatest Auction, Family Fortunes, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, I Kissed a Boy and The Big Celebrity Detox.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Sian, who's 24, wants a man to drive her wild, who she can love more than her beloved car. And 33-year-old fashion entrepreneur Tansel is after a woman to settle down with.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Can Olympic kickboxer Aston inspire Olympic bobsleigh athlete Jordan to turn over a new leaf and settle down? Or will his eyes wander.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Bec attempts to apologise for her text scandal at the sixth dinner party. But apparently that also involves shifting the blame onto someone else.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Eurovision, Citadel, The Greatest Auction, Family Fortunes, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, I Kissed a Boy and The Big Celebrity Detox.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons go to London with $1000 that Bart found, but Homer crashes the hire car into the Queen and gets locked in the Tower. Tony Blair guest stars.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam makes an inspirational video about a football game against William Penn's rival. Beverly and Murray try to buy a neighbour's house.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry's poison ivy causes problems for Erica and Geoff. And having Mr Glascott living next door presents a challenge for the whole family.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan loves music and Stoke-on-Trent, so when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to organise their wedding, he plans Northern Soul nuptials.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay reluctantly takes Phil out to fly his new model plane, but a manoeuvre goes awry..

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell's mother, Dede, drops in for a surprise visit and is determined to make amends with everyone who she offended during 'the incident'.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owner of the Mill Street Bistro in Ohio claims to have the best menu between New York and LA. But the diners don't agree.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Hunt for the Great Albino Pumpkin: Adam is tired of Halloween. Barry and Joanne meet Elvira, Mistress of the Dark.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly encourages Principal Ball to establish a non-athlete Senior Night. Erica struggles to appoint a pre-wedding 'fun captain'.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil takes Haley to visit his alma mater. Claire goes out with Mitchell and Cameron. Gloria and Jay may have to broach a delicate subject with Manny.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchetts rally for a good cause after a neighbour's house burns down, but there's a downside to their Samaritan intentions when Jay throws out his back.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is chosen to appear in a superhero movie and the film studio hires a celebrity trainer (guest star Seth Rogen) to help him develop a muscular physique.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Edna Krabappel confiscates her students' phones, Bart gets revenge by spiking her coffee with alcohol, and Principal Skinner fires her for being drunk.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The male citizens of Springfield become obsessed with the brutal sport of Ultimate Punching, and Marge ends up getting challenged to step into the ring..

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A 60-something raver meets a part-time DJ. A competitive Pokémon player hooks up with a comic book fan. And a dog walker and a science guy bond over a love of pub quizzes.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion to the Mill Street Bistro saga, Gordon's disagreement with the proprietor erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back: Marge takes Lisa on a city theatre trip to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer tells Maggie a bedtime story about the Simpson and Flanders families getting stranded when they go on holiday together to the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron's birthday falls on 29 February, and with the celebrations coming but once every four years, there's loads of pressure on Mitchell to get it right.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The funeral service for a beloved clown mentor reunites Cameron with his estranged ex-clown partner, Lewis. And Manny has a cool new friend.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is chosen to appear in a superhero movie and the film studio hires a celebrity trainer (guest star Seth Rogen) to help him develop a muscular physique.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Edna Krabappel confiscates her students' phones, Bart gets revenge by spiking her coffee with alcohol, and Principal Skinner fires her for being drunk.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The male citizens of Springfield become obsessed with the brutal sport of Ultimate Punching, and Marge ends up getting challenged to step into the ring..

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Things get really awkward when the final five are challenged to critique each other's modelling potential. And in the photo shoot they must portray ancient Olympic sports.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Treehouse of Horror Presents Simpsons Wicked This Way Comes: A mysterious tattoo-covered fella at the carnival tells Lisa three surreal stories.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons endure a nightmare flight on Convenience Airways - the only airline in America that Homer's isn't banned from.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes infatuated with his new teacher. Lisa becomes infatuated with an octopus.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is a huge success when he fills in for Krusty on TV. Guest starring Mr T and Jackie Mason.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Can cocktail mixer Jack stir Alice's feelings? Will beautician Sophie and party girl Tori bridge the age gap? And might sparks fly when dog groomer Brenna meets electrician Ross.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Taron Egerton is Elton John in Dexter Fletcher's sequins-and-all biopic musical drama. With Jamie Bell as lyricist Bernie Taupin and Stephen Graham as music mogul Dick James.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Sex toy tester Hayley wants the perfect partner to get her buzzing. And tree surgeon Dmitri is in for a big shock.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Nameya is after both beauty and brains: will she find her perfect package in a sexy guy or her first ever girlfriend? Dan loves a fairy-tale, but she's yet to find her leading man.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Vigil, Ready to Mingle, Beat the Chasers, Help, Antiques Roadshow, Life Drawing Live!, Take a Hike, and ITV News on the US Open.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Some best bits from the all-star season ahead of the final two episodes, as well as some juicy unseen footage, including Angelea's fascination with Kim Kardashian's rear end.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is a laughing stock when he's caught on tape running from a bear at the dump, so he hunts down the bear in an attempt to regain his dignity.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Hunt for the Great Albino Pumpkin: Adam is tired of Halloween. Barry and Joanne meet Elvira, Mistress of the Dark.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly encourages Principal Ball to establish a non-athlete Senior Night. Erica struggles to appoint a pre-wedding 'fun captain'.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One on a Thai Farm: After a hilltop proposal, hopeless romantic Gavin plans nuptials in Somerset for his fiancée Sophie, with a combined theme of farmyard and Thai.

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: In the first elimination task, the teams construct fairy tales with a twist - from sci-fi Beauty and the Beast to criminal Alice in Wonderland.
